description: Building detail page has Applications tab
steps: Open company.buildings.$id.tsx and verify Tab type includes 'applications'
Verify tabs array includes { key: 'applications', label: t('buildings.tabApplications') }
Verify ApplicationList component is rendered when activeTab is 'applications'
Verify ApplicationList import is present at top of file

description: ApplicationList component displays applications with status filters
steps: Open ApplicationList.tsx and verify it calls getApplicationsForBuilding on mount
Verify it has filter tabs: All, Pending, Accepted, Rejected
Verify changing filter tab reloads applications with the selected status
Verify it shows pending count when filter is 'all'

description: ApplicationCard component shows application details with Accept/Reject actions
steps: Open ApplicationCard.tsx and verify it displays contractor logo, name (linked to profile), company name
Verify it shows specialty badge, message content, proposed rate with currency
Verify Accept button calls onAccept when application is pending
Verify Reject button reveals notes textarea, then calls onReject with notes
Verify Accept/Reject buttons only show when status is 'pending'

description: Accepting an application creates contractor assignment
steps: Open ApplicationList.tsx and verify handleAccept calls acceptApplicationAndAssign
Verify success shows toast and reloads the list
Open ApplicationList.tsx and verify handleReject calls updateApplicationStatus with 'rejected' and notes
Verify reject success shows toast and reloads the list
